text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is exhausted, so I decide to bring her to
the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon. This is nothing. You worry too much.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But if you say so... I guess... I'll... rest...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Wh-where am I?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! S-someone! Trainer! Hel—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait a sec. What's that floatin' over there?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! That motorcycle's sooooo cool! Sick! It's
even got jet-black wings on it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So cool! So coooool! I've never seen anything like
it! Lemme on it! I wanna take it for a riiide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroo, vroo, vroo vroom... Vroooom! Vrooooom...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh yeahhhhh! I'm so awesome right now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is this... a race track? Ah, I see. Time to let it
rip!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait. Whoooa! The wings're on my legs now?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight! Let's tear this track up!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whew! Man am I cool or—what?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wh-where am I?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was a dream! Man! That was the best dream
ever!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Someday, I'm definitely gonna make it come
true. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her dream, Vodka seems to have
gotten her energy back. She leaves the infirmary
in a good mood.
Fweeeeet! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're under arrest for driving without a license,
shouting, and making me uncomfortable. Straight
to jail with no bail.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet?! But why?! Those charges are ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you want out, you have to write "Dear Lady
Scarlet, will you pretty, pretty please forgive
me?" with your tail and show it to the entire
world!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What a lame punishment! This can't be real. Wake
me up from this nightmare!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
At least gimme one of those cool, orange prison
uniforms!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what? It was a dream!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A dreeeeam! A dream! Thank gooooodness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her nightmare, Vodka didn't manage to
rest well at all.
